title: Game Mode Abbreviations
description: Adds back the pre-1.13 abbreviations for /gamemode.
body:
Adds back the pre-1.13 abbreviations for `/gamemode`.
| Game Mode | Number Abbreviation | Letter Abbreviation |
|-----------|---------------------|---------------------|
| Survival  | `0`                 | `s`                 |
| Creative  | `1`                 | `c`                 |
| Adventure | `2`                 | `a`                 |
| Spectator | `3`                 | `sp`                |
